text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! I thought of a cool one-liner!<n>Couldja
give it a listen for me?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I spent all night thinking it up, so I'm<n>sure it's a
masterpiece!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaa-ha-ha-ha-ha! All right, show me<n>the depth
of your abyss!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I am the Ultimate Supernova of the<n>Racecourse!
Pull my trigger and watch<n>me fly... Bam!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I could feel the radical nature of your<n>nightmare.
The rich vibrations of your<n>supernova echoed
endlessly into the<n>night!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... How'd you make it even cooler?!
